matchingText.description: The best matching phrase found in the classification

theCode.description: Code of the best matching entity found in the classification

foundationURI.description: Foundation URI of the best matching entity found in the classification

linearizationURI.description: Linearization URI of the best matching entity found in the classification

matchScore.description: Shows the score of the match. The score is a value between 0 and 1. The higher the score the better the match.
